title: Would you take their place
wikitext:
[]: Would you take their place?             Quote Post by poetic_assassin » Mon Jan 16, 2006 2:49 pm Who in here would honestly take the place of an Eva pilot? Not for fun or your own gain, but for defending NERVE against the angels. Anyone?

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Mon Jan 16, 2006 3:27 pm For all our idiosyncracies, I doubt anyone on these boards qualifies as mentally unbalanced enough to pilot an Eva.

[]:             Quote Post by darth_mark » Mon Jan 16, 2006 4:02 pm we may not get along all that well but i wouldn't want my mom absorbed into an eva.

[]:             Quote Post by Space Penis » Mon Jan 16, 2006 6:50 pm I probably would, yeah. Darth Mark raises a point though.

[]:             Quote Post by jcmoorehead » Tue Jan 17, 2006 12:58 pm I'd jump at the chance to pilot one.

[]:             Quote Post by beramodk » Tue Jan 17, 2006 2:50 pm i would want my mom to become a god...... then i'll be.. jesus?

[]:             Quote Post by darth_mark » Tue Jan 17, 2006 3:50 pm as cool as it sounds to be kickin' some angel ass in an eva, being in such close proximity to something that has my mother's soul is just so... icky. plus you can't really bring a date in one of those things to show off how cool your wicked new eva is, well.. you could.. but again with the icky.

[]:             Quote Post by poetic_assassin » Wed Jan 18, 2006 1:28 pm Who else thinks that Shinji would gladly take the place of any of us ?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Jan 19, 2006 3:10 pm darth_mark wrote: as cool as it sounds to be kickin' some angel ass in an eva, being in such close proximity to something that has my mother's soul is just so... icky..

[]:             Quote Post by AcesHigh » Thu Jan 19, 2006 7:03 pm I agree, they're always having to run tedious tests and those system checks. The pilots almost live at NERV..

[]:             Quote Post by Kyle » Thu Jan 19, 2006 8:13 pm ah hell id take shins place.he probably wouldnt let me but id just punch him in the face and say its for your own mental well being and hop in the plug.id even live through EOE hopital scene and all......yeah i said it,what?

[]:             Quote Post by K2Grey » Sun Jan 22, 2006 9:58 pm Hell no! You'd have to be a retard to want to be an Eva pilot (either that or really, really brave). At the moment I am considering the battle vs. the 3rd angel and whether or not I would be able to hang on for the 45 or so seconds of being ripped through the midsection with energy tentacles before the angel finally dies. I figure this is impossible to answer ahead of time, but it surely would absolutely suck (and it is really impressive how Shinji returned to piloting after that).

[]:             Quote Post by Ryo » Mon Jan 23, 2006 1:12 am K2Grey wrote: Hell no! You'd have to be a retard to want to be an Eva pilot (either that or really, really brave). At the moment I am considering the battle vs. the 3rd angel and whether or not I would be able to hang on for the 45 or so seconds of being ripped through the midsection with energy tentacles before the angel finally dies. I figure this is impossible to answer ahead of time, but it surely would absolutely suck (and it is really impressive how Shinji returned to piloting after that).

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Mon Jan 23, 2006 1:35 am Not for fun or your own gain

[]:             Quote Post by Faußtin » Tue Jan 24, 2006 9:36 am poetic_assassin wrote: Who in here would honestly take the place of an Eva pilot? Not for fun or your own gain, but for defending NERVE against the angels. Anyone?

[]:             Quote Post by Six Winged Angel » Tue Jan 24, 2006 3:24 pm It would be fun to get into an Eva and go for a walk around the country but NO , no fighting angels :P

[]:             Quote Post by Kyle » Tue Jan 24, 2006 5:45 pm Six Winged Angel wrote: It would be fun to get into an Eva and go for a walk around the country but NO , no fighting angels :P

[]:             Quote Post by Defectron » Tue Jan 24, 2006 6:33 pm OH let's just go walk around the country side in a big ass robot destroying public property for no reason!BULLSHIT.

[]:             Quote Post by Six Winged Angel » Wed Jan 25, 2006 2:08 am why...? Greece-UK in less than 2 hours! :cry: :P I was not serious of course! :roll:

[]:             Quote Post by Hand of God » Sun Jan 29, 2006 12:55 am I would take over any time and would kick ass and take names!

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Mon Jan 16, 2006 3:27 pm For all our idiosyncracies, I doubt anyone on these boards qualifies
